title: NijahPlay's Performance Base
description: This is "NijahPlay's Personal Pack" with all the mods removed except performance mods, for absolute speed!
body:
### NijahPlay's Performance Base

This modpack is the foundation for [NijahPlay's Personal Pack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nijahplays-personal-pack) and is made specifically for raw speed and maximum FPS.

This is a really light modpack focused on high performance and low resource usage, without changing vanilla Minecraft. It includes the most common optimization mods like **Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix,** and **ImmediatelyFast** as well as some very new mods for performance in less common parts of the game.

This is my primary and most frequently updated modpack.

---

### **Important Notes:**

*   **To Reset Settings:** Delete `options.txt` and all files inside the `config` folder (except the `yosbr` folder and `simple-modpack-update-checker.json`).
